Vulnerabilities.Title: Prototype pollution in lodash
Vulnerabilities.Description: Lodash merge allows prototype pollution via specially crafted objects.

Vulnerabilities.Title: ReDoS in minimatch
Vulnerabilities.Description: Minimatch is vulnerable to regular expression denial of service.

Vulnerabilities.Title: Command injection in shell-quote
Vulnerabilities.Description: shell-quote allows command injection via malformed input.

Vulnerabilities.Title: SQL injection in Django ORM
Vulnerabilities.Description: Certain Django ORM queries allow SQL injection via annotate().

Vulnerabilities.Title: Information disclosure in requests
Vulnerabilities.Description: The requests library leaks proxy credentials.

Vulnerabilities.Title: Open redirect in rack
Vulnerabilities.Description: Rack allows open redirect via the location header.
